productDisplayName: Gliders Men Black & Brown Volant Sandals
description: Style NoteThis gliders floater is a comfortable footwear that performs well when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies!Product DetailsBlunt toed floaters with light brown forefoot and midfoot straps that have Velcro closuresStrap connecting the forefoot strap and the ankle loop, with elastication at the backfoot strapOval nubs at the footbed for an all-day-massage feelLightweight rubber outsole with multidirectional lugs all overMaterial and careSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
